description.content: Returns service health and runtime execution limit.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

Sends a user message to the agent.

Behavior:
- Without `conversation_id`: creates a new conversation.
- With `conversation_id`: resumes an existing conversation.
- With `stream=true`: returns `text/event-stream` (SSE).

If no due tasks exist, returns checked=0.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

HTTP API for PicoClaw (serverless-oriented runtime).

Notes:
- All endpoints except `/health` require Bearer token authentication.
- `POST /chat` supports both JSON response mode and SSE streaming mode.
- Memory and conversation history are persisted via mounted storage and reused across separate requests.
- Scheduled tasks are externally triggered by calling `/task/check`.
- `POST /control/stop` can be used to request graceful save-and-exit.
